name: Bacon'n Cheddar Beer Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Place vegetable oil in a large stockpot. Add onions, potatoes, carrots, and celery; sauté 25-30 minutes or until the vegetables are cooked.
2. Add the remaining ingredients. Combine thoroughly. Simmer for 20 minutes over low heat, stirring occasionally.
3. Serve hot.
Makes 25 one-cup servings.
